title: Apply Due Date When Status Changes
excerpt:

posts.author: ReadingTub (Terry Doherty)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have looked at both status and date automations and seem to be stumped. Saw that @DougW has a way of adding a “Date Stamp” to a project when something is moved to a group, but not sure how to do that either.

What I have: When a status changes to “done” it is moved to a “completed” group. That works great.

What I want to do: When a Status changes to Done I want the Complete [date] column to add today’s date either before or after the move.

posts.author: DougW (Douglas Warner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add this 2nd automation to what you already have
